column6:
APEX Standard matches the HID 00 Signo standard. We will enable people to do whatever they want, then as they get more secure they can update the reader to be better via Configure and an educational one pager. 


NOTE: After further testing with Kris/Nate/Jacob, it was found that wallet behaves oddly on APEX with CSNs enabled. While they are able to work together, having CSNs on causes wallet to read slower and occasionally pull up a credit card instead of your credential. This is something we may be able to fix in the future, but Kris would need time to research and implement a solution.

column2: Ignores W37-1 prox with BID greater than or equal to 25,769,803,776
